Database¶

models¶

class src.database.models.Base(**kwargs: Any)[source]¶

Bases: DeclarativeBase

SQLAlchemy declarative base.

metadata: ClassVar[MetaData] = MetaData()¶

Refers to the _schema.MetaData collection that will be used for new _schema.Table objects.

See also

orm_declarative_metadata

registry: ClassVar[registry] = <sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api.registry object>¶

Refers to the _orm.registry in use where new _orm.Mapper objects will be associated.

class src.database.models.Contact(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Base

ORM model representing a contact belonging to a user.

birthday: Mapped[datetime | None]¶
email: Mapped[str]¶
first_name: Mapped[str]¶
id: Mapped[int]¶
last_name: Mapped[str]¶
notes: Mapped[str | None]¶
phone: Mapped[str]¶
user: Mapped[User]¶
user_id: Mapped[int]¶
class src.database.models.User(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Base

ORM model representing an application user.

avatar: Mapped[str | None]¶
confirmed: Mapped[bool]¶
contacts: Mapped[list[Contact]]¶
created_at: Mapped[datetime]¶
email: Mapped[str]¶
hashed_password: Mapped[str]¶
id: Mapped[int]¶
refresh_token: Mapped[str | None]¶
role: Mapped[str]¶
username: Mapped[str]¶
class src.database.models.UserRole(*values)[source]¶

Bases: str, Enum

User role enumeration.

admin = 'admin'¶
user = 'user'¶

db¶

Async SQLAlchemy engine and session factory.

async src.database.db.get_db() → AsyncSession[source]¶

FastAPI dependency that yields an async SQLAlchemy session.

Yields:

An AsyncSession bound to the application database.
